stimulus:
Welcome! This experiment will take around 17 minutes.

To avoid technical issues, please keep the experiment tab (on Chrome or Firefox) active and fullscreen for the whole duration of each task.

Press enter to begin.

Place your index finger on the comma key (,) and your middle finger on the period key (.)

During this task, on each trial you will see a letter presented, a short break, and then a second letter. For instance, you may see an "A" followed by an "F".

If the first letter was an "A" AND the second letter is an "X", press your middle finger. Otherwise, press your index finger.

We'll start with a practice round. During practice, you will receive feedback and a reminder of the rules. These will be taken out for the test, so make sure you understand the instructions before moving on.

Remember, press your middle finger after you see "A" followed by an "X", and your index finger for all other combinations.

Try to respond as quickly and accurately as possible.
Press enter to begin practice.

We will now start the test portion.

Keep your index finger on the comma key (,) and your middle finger on the period key (.)

Press enter to continue.

attention_check_question:
Press the j key

This screen will advance automatically in 15 seconds. Do not press shift.

stimulus:
Please take this time to read your feedback! This screen will advance automatically in 30 seconds.

You have completed 1 out of 3 blocks of trials.

Press enter to continue.

attention_check_question:

This screen will advance automatically in 15 seconds. Do not press shift.

stimulus:
Please take this time to read your feedback! This screen will advance automatically in 30 seconds.

You have completed 2 out of 3 blocks of trials.

Press enter to continue.
